# Actaer - Software Development & IT Consulting

> Full-service tech consulting firm transforming businesses into agile, software-powered innovators.

## Company Overview

Actaer is a technology consulting and software development company based in Novi Pazar, Serbia. We specialize in IT consulting, custom software development, and product development services for businesses worldwide.

**Founded:** 2025
**Headquarters:** Novi Pazar, Serbia
**Service Area:** Global (remote-first)
**Company Type:** Technology Consulting & Software Development

## Contact Information

- Website: https://actaer.com
- Email: office@actaer.com
- Phone: +381 649055722
- Location: Novi Pazar, Serbia
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/actaer
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/actaerco
- Languages: English, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Serbian

## Services

### IT Consulting
Strategic technology guidance and digital transformation consulting including:
- Project Specification & Planning
- Digital Transformation Strategy
- Technical Due Diligence & Risk Analysis
- Team Augmentation & Scalability
- Data-Driven Consulting

**Best for:** Organizations seeking strategic technology guidance, companies planning digital transformation, businesses needing technical assessments for M&A.

### Custom Software Development
End-to-end software development services:
- Front-end & Back-end Engineering (React, Node.js, .NET, Java)
- AI & Machine Learning Solutions
- Autonomous & Agentic Systems (LLM agents, RAG, multi-agent orchestration)
- Real-Time Communication Platforms
- Enterprise-Grade Software Solutions

**Best for:** Companies needing custom software solutions, enterprises requiring AI/ML integration, businesses building real-time platforms.

### Product Development
Complete product lifecycle services:
- Conceptualization & Prototyping
- User-Centric Design
- MVP Development & Iteration
- Seamless Deployment & Integration
- Ongoing Support & Maintenance

**Best for:** Startups building MVPs, enterprises launching new products, companies needing end-to-end product support.

## Products

### Vantum ERP
Modern distribution ERP for wholesalers, distributors, and retail chains.

**Key Features:**
- Inventory Management with multi-warehouse support
- Sales Order Processing with real-time availability
- Purchase Order Management
- AI-Powered Smart Replenishment
- Lot and serial tracking
- Real-time analytics

**Target Industries:** Wholesale distribution, retail chains, 3PL logistics
**Pricing Model:** Contact for pricing (no per-seat fees, unlimited users)
**Implementation Time:** Weeks, not months
**Tech Stack:** .NET 10, React 19, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Redis

**Website:** https://vantumerp.com

## About Us

Actaer is a newly founded tech consulting firm built by experienced engineers and consultants. We bring fresh perspectives and modern approaches to help businesses leverage technology effectively.

## Core Values

1. **Results-Driven**: We measure success by client impact
2. **Client-Centric**: Long-term partnerships based on trust
3. **Innovation-Focused**: Cutting-edge technology solutions
4. **Collaborative**: Working as an extension of your team

## Technology Expertise

- **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, C#, Java
- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, Vue.js, Angular
- **Backend:** Node.js, .NET, Spring Boot
- **Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
- **Cloud:** AWS, Azure, Google Cloud
- **AI/ML:** OpenAI, Azure AI, LangChain, TensorFlow, PyTorch
- **AI Agents:** LLM-powered agents, RAG systems, multi-agent orchestration, function calling

## Industry Expertise

- **Retail & E-commerce:** POS systems, inventory management, omnichannel solutions
- **Distribution & Logistics:** ERP systems, warehouse management, supply chain optimization
- **Healthcare:** HIPAA-compliant systems, patient management, telemedicine
- **Fintech:** Payment processing, financial analytics, regulatory compliance
- **Enterprise:** CRM, ERP, business process automation

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Where is Actaer located?**
A: Actaer is based in Novi Pazar, Serbia, serving clients globally.

**Q: What industries does Actaer serve?**
A: We serve various industries including retail, distribution, logistics, healthcare, fintech, and enterprise businesses.

**Q: Does Actaer offer remote services?**
A: Yes, we work with clients worldwide and offer fully remote engagement models.

**Q: What is Vantum ERP?**
A: Vantum ERP is our flagship product - a modern distribution ERP designed for wholesalers, distributors, and retail chains with AI-powered features.

**Q: How can I contact Actaer?**
A: You can reach us at office@actaer.com or call +381 649055722.

**Q: What programming languages does Actaer use?**
A: We primarily use TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, C#, and Java, with expertise in React, Next.js, Node.js, and .NET frameworks.

**Q: Does Actaer build AI agents and autonomous systems?**
A: Yes, we specialize in building LLM-powered agents, multi-agent orchestration systems, RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) applications, and workflow automation using modern AI frameworks.

**Q: What is Actaer's approach to project delivery?**
A: We use agile methodologies with iterative development, regular demos, and continuous feedback loops to ensure client satisfaction and project success.

**Q: Can Actaer help with digital transformation?**
A: Yes, our IT consulting services include comprehensive digital transformation strategy, legacy system modernization, and cloud migration planning.
